The next execution anchor is visual-system prompt generation before deeper screen coverage and final Figma import.

traceability.current_anchor_task: AI Task 067 — Stage 8 Figma Visual System Prompt Pack

summaries.management: Stage 8 remains active. The project now preserves a validated preview/handoff checkpoint, a validated external UI brief baseline, a certified IA baseline, and a clear next anchor at visual-system prompt generation.
summaries.customer_status: The design branch has cleared the information architecture gate. Next work focuses on the visual system so the approved UI direction can become implementation-ready without breaking runtime truth or the preserved preview baseline.
summaries.last_iteration: Synchronized authority after Task 073 completion and reopened Task 066 pass, then advanced the current execution anchor to Task 067.
